Hardik Pandya Stars as India Crush SA in 1st T20I by 101 Runs

Dec 10, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Hardik Pandya Stars as India Crush SA in 1st T20I by 101 Runs

Hardik Pandya led India’s emphatic victory over South Africa in the first T20I in Cuttack, combining a blistering batting display with an all-round performance that set the tone for the five-match series. His unbeaten 59 off 28 balls powered India to 175/6, while South Africa crumbled to their lowest-ever T20I total of 74, handing India a 101-run victory.

You can read the full original article on 8jj.com here:
👉 Hardik Pandya Stars as India Crush SA in 1st T20I by 101 Runs
